attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CAST(TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS VARCHAR(3)) as BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
CAST(TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE AS VARCHAR(50))  as BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
CAST(TVOUTPUT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) as AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE, 
CAST(TVOUTPUT.AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION AS VARCHAR(255)) as AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE as START_DATE_ACTIVE,
COALESCE (MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 
FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') as END_DATE_ACTIVE,
CAST(TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE AS CHAR(1)) as ACTION_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE as EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) as RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NATTTV.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL 
THEN 'U'ELSE 'I' END) as DML_TYPE, 
CAST (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) as TIMESTAMP (0)) as CREATE_DATETIME,
CAST(TVOUTPUT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT AS BIGINT) as SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT ,
CAST(TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_CODE
FROM
(SELECT
	BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
	AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
	AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
	SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT, 
	SS_CODE,
	START_TV_DATE,
	CREATE_DATETIME, 
	ACTION_CODE, 
	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_COMPANY_CODE,BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
	AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION	ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
	FROM 
	(SELECT NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		SORCTT.NAME BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
		SORCTT.TYPE_CODE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		SORCTT.DESCRIPTION AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
		SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		'OOD' as SS_CODE, 
		CAST (SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE, 
		SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		SORCTT.ACTION_CODE,
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		(SEL * FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,ORG_ID order by LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1) SORCTT
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC ON
		SORCTT.ORG_ID = EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
        ON SORCTT.ORG_ID= NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='OOD'
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
ON EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NFC.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
		UNION ALL
		SELECT NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		EORCTT.NAME BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
		EORCTT.TYPE_CODE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		EORCTT.DESCRIPTION AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
		EORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		'OOD' as SS_CODE, 
		CAST(EORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
		EORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		EORCTT.ACTION_CODE, 
		EORCTT.EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		(SEL * FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,ORG_ID order by LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1) EORCTT
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY   EOOSC
		ON  EORCTT.ORG_ID = EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
        ON  EORCTT.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='OOD'
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV  NFC
ON EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NFC.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		NATTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		NATTT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		NATTT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
		NATTT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		NATTT.AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
		NATTT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		NATTT.SS_CODE, 
		NATTT.START_TV_DATE,
		NATTT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME, 
		'X' ACTION_CODE, 
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE_TV NATTT,
		$$FINLGLVWDB. N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY   EOOSC,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
		WHERE NATTT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD'
		AND NATTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	      AND NFC.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
		AND NATTT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
		AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE =NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
		AND NATTT.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
		AND (NATTT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID) in
			(SELECT SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,SORCTT.ORG_ID FROM 
			$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT
			UNION
			SELECT EORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,EORCTT.ORG_ID FROM 
			$$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES EORCTT
			where EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI')
			AND EOOSC.IDENTIFIER = 'OOD'
		) TVINPUT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,TVINPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,TVINPUT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE_TV NATTTV
ON TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NATTTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY= NATTTV.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND TVOUTPUT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE= NATTTV.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
AND NATTTV.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
AND NATTTV.SS_CODE=TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

UNION ALL

SELECT 
TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE as BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE as BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE as AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION as AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE as START_DATE_ACTIVE,
COALESCE (MAX (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 
FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') as END_DATE_ACTIVE,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE as ACTION_CODE, 
TVOUTPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE as EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, TVOUTPUT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) as RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NATTTV.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL 
THEN 'U'ELSE 'I' END) as DML_TYPE, 
CAST (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) as TIMESTAMP (0)) as CREATE_DATETIME,
TVOUTPUT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT as SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT ,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE
FROM
(SELECT
	BK_COMPANY_CODE,
	BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
	BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
	AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
	AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
	SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT, 
	SS_CODE,
	START_TV_DATE,
	CREATE_DATETIME, 
	ACTION_CODE, 
	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_COMPANY_CODE,BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
	AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION	ORDER BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
	FROM 
	(SELECT NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		SORCTT.NAME BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
		SORCTT.TYPE_CODE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		SORCTT.DESCRIPTION AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
		SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		'OOD' as SS_CODE, 
		CAST (SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE, 
		SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		SORCTT.ACTION_CODE,
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		(SEL * FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,ORG_ID order by LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1) SORCTT
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC ON
		SORCTT.ORG_ID = EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
        ON SORCTT.ORG_ID= NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='OOD'
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
ON EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NFC.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
		UNION ALL
		SELECT NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		EORCTT.NAME BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
		EORCTT.TYPE_CODE AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		EORCTT.DESCRIPTION AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION,
		EORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		'OOD' as SS_CODE, 
		CAST(EORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
		EORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME, 
		EORCTT.ACTION_CODE, 
		EORCTT.EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		(SEL * FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES 
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,ORG_ID order by LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)=1) EORCTT
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY   EOOSC
		ON  EORCTT.ORG_ID = EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
        ON  EORCTT.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD ='OOD'
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
        INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV  NFC
ON EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NFC.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		NATTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
		NATTT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
		NATTT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, 
		NATTT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE,
		NATTT.AR_TRX_TYPE_DESCRIPTION, 
		NATTT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,
		NATTT.SS_CODE, 
		NATTT.START_TV_DATE,
		NATTT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME CREATE_DATETIME, 
		'X' ACTION_CODE, 
		'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE_TV NATTT,
		$$FINLGLVWDB. N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY   EOOSC,
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
		WHERE NATTT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD'
		AND NATTT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	      AND NFC.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
		AND NATTT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
		AND EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
		AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE =NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
		AND NATTT.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
		AND (NATTT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT,EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID) in
			(SELECT SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,SORCTT.ORG_ID FROM 
			$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT
			UNION
			SELECT EORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,EORCTT.ORG_ID FROM 
			$$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES EORCTT
			where EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI')
			AND EOOSC.IDENTIFIER = 'FUSN'
		) TVINPUT 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE,TVINPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,TVINPUT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE, TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
) TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE_TV NATTTV
ON TVOUTPUT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NATTTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND TVOUTPUT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY= NATTTV.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND TVOUTPUT. BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE= NATTTV.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
AND NATTTV.END_TV_DATE = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
AND NATTTV.SS_CODE=TVOUTPUT.SS_CODE
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT SORCTT.CREATION_DATE,       
SORCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,       
SORCTT.DESCRIPTION      , 
SORCTT.NAME       ,
SORCTT.ORG_ID      , 
SORCTT.TYPE_CODE,
SORCTT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
SORCTT.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SORCTT.ACTION_CODE ,
'RI' As EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SORCTT
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
                 WHERE SORCTT.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD')
OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
WHERE SORCTT.ORG_ID=EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
		AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE=NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
AND NFC.END_TV_DATE=DATE '3500-01-01')

SELECT        
SOFRCTT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,       
SOFRCTT.DESCRIPTION      , 
SOFRCTT.NAME       ,
SOFRCTT.ORG_ID      , 
SOFRCTT.TYPE_CODE,
SOFRCTT.CREATION_DATE,
SOFRCTT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
SOFRCTT.CREATE_DATETIME ,
SOFRCTT.ACTION_CODE ,
'RI' As EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUST_TRX_TYPES SOFRCTT
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
                 WHERE SOFRCTT.ORG_ID= NCOU. SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'OOD')
OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
WHERE SOFRCTT.ORG_ID=EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
		AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE=NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
		AND EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND NSOB.SS_CODE='EMEA'
AND NFC.END_TV_DATE=DATE '3500-01-01')
